title: The Quizzical Ancients.
description: The Quizzical Lands before man found The King Eggbert and His dynasty. This is the Quizzical Ancients, a time where sniffers were close to extinction and a time before Eggbert and his sanctuarium.
body:
"The Quizzical Lands before man found The King Eggbert and His dynasty. This is the Quizzical Ancients, a time where sniffers were close to extinction and a time before Eggbert and his sanctuarium."

# This may be the only version! Although if you report any game breaking bugs I might update it. # 

![Quizzical Seeds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ea08ac31db0b7529decc8bf8cd05fbb549868cc.png)

#   #
![What is this?](https://i.ibb.co/y0DKxS8/minecraft-title.png)
#   #

A very similar vanilla friendly modpack for the current latest version of Minecraft 1.21. This modpack includes the following:
- Server Optimization
- Vanilla Friendly Netherite Expansion and New and Unqiue Weapons
- QOL tweaks, Vanilla Tweaks and Optimized Performance
- Areas for Factions (Good for multiplayer use)
- MacOS Small Fixes
- Fresh Moves and Fresh Animation resource packs
- Journey Map
- Voice chat
- End worldgen update (Nullscape, No new additions)
- Spyglass Astronomy
- Signed Paintings (Custom Paintings)
- Repurposed structures for all dimensions.

#   #
![Additional Info](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f16dcc3cac004cfb88b76f42a2cca2f78f3555f.png)
#   #



I have a discord to another big project I'm working on, I host minecraft events and make content on Youtube. Interested getting involved? Join the discord on the sidebar!
